rules.text: WHEN [^"Mortal" IS feeding_victim] THEN MAY PROVIDE ^"Resonance"
WHEN [^"Mortal" IS feeding_victim] THEN MAY PROVIDE ^"Resonance"
WHEN [^"Ghoul" NOT fed vitae] THEN AGE normally
WHEN [^"Ghoul" FED vitae] THEN DOES NOT age
WHEN [^"Ghoul" USES discipline] THEN USES ^"Blood Potency" 0
WHEN [^"Mortal" IS feeding_victim] THEN MAY PROVIDE ^"Resonance"
WHEN [^"Hunter" DETECTS vampire] THEN MAY use ^"Edges"
WHEN [^"Hunter" IS Professional] THEN GAINS equipment_access
WHEN [^"Kindred" TAKES DAMAGE] THEN MARK Superficial or Aggravated
WHEN [^"Humanity" == 0] THEN ^"Kindred" IS lost to Beast
WHEN [^"Kindred" EXPOSED to sunlight] THEN TAKE Aggravated damage
WHEN [^"Kindred" TAKES DAMAGE] THEN MARK Superficial or Aggravated
WHEN [^"Humanity" == 0] THEN ^"Kindred" IS lost to Beast
WHEN [^"Kindred" EXPOSED to sunlight] THEN TAKE Aggravated damage
WHEN [^"Thin-Blood" USES discipline] THEN MAY require Thin-Blood Alchemy
WHEN [^"Thin-Blood" IS ^"Daywalker"] THEN CAN tolerate sunlight
WHEN [^"Thin-Blood" DIABLERIZES] THEN MAY increase ^"Blood Potency"
WHEN [^"Kindred" TAKES DAMAGE] THEN MARK Superficial or Aggravated
WHEN [^"Humanity" == 0] THEN ^"Kindred" IS lost to Beast
WHEN [^"Kindred" EXPOSED to sunlight] THEN TAKE Aggravated damage
WHEN [^"Brujah" SUFFERS ^"Clan Compulsion"] THEN MUST rebel against authority
WHEN [^"Kindred" TAKES DAMAGE] THEN MARK Superficial or Aggravated
WHEN [^"Humanity" == 0] THEN ^"Kindred" IS lost to Beast
WHEN [^"Kindred" EXPOSED to sunlight] THEN TAKE Aggravated damage
WHEN [^"Gangrel" SUFFERS Bestial failure] THEN GAIN animal feature
WHEN [^"Kindred" TAKES DAMAGE] THEN MARK Superficial or Aggravated
WHEN [^"Humanity" == 0] THEN ^"Kindred" IS lost to Beast
WHEN [^"Kindred" EXPOSED to sunlight] THEN TAKE Aggravated damage
WHEN [^"Malkavian" EMBRACED] THEN DEVELOP mental derangement
WHEN [^"Kindred" TAKES DAMAGE] THEN MARK Superficial or Aggravated
WHEN [^"Humanity" == 0] THEN ^"Kindred" IS lost to Beast
WHEN [^"Kindred" EXPOSED to sunlight] THEN TAKE Aggravated damage
WHEN [^"Nosferatu" APPEARS without Obfuscate] THEN LOSE 2 dice Social pools
WHEN [^"Kindred" TAKES DAMAGE] THEN MARK Superficial or Aggravated
WHEN [^"Humanity" == 0] THEN ^"Kindred" IS lost to Beast
WHEN [^"Kindred" EXPOSED to sunlight] THEN TAKE Aggravated damage
WHEN [^"Toreador" ENCOUNTERS beauty] THEN MAY become entranced
WHEN [^"Kindred" TAKES DAMAGE] THEN MARK Superficial or Aggravated
WHEN [^"Humanity" == 0] THEN ^"Kindred" IS lost to Beast
WHEN [^"Kindred" EXPOSED to sunlight] THEN TAKE Aggravated damage
WHEN [^"Tremere" BLOOD BONDS] THEN BOND is one level weaker than normal
WHEN [^"Kindred" TAKES DAMAGE] THEN MARK Superficial or Aggravated
WHEN [^"Humanity" == 0] THEN ^"Kindred" IS lost to Beast
WHEN [^"Kindred" EXPOSED to sunlight] THEN TAKE Aggravated damage
WHEN [^"Ventrue" FEEDS from non-preferred] THEN GAIN no sustenance
WHEN [^"NPC" INTERACTS with players] THEN USE simplified mechanics
WHEN [^"Coterie" ESTABLISHED] THEN REQUIRE at least 2 ^"Members"
WHEN [^"Coterie" GAINS ^"Domain"] THEN ACCESS domain merits
MODIFY: messy_criticals NOW DEFINED BY #Ge42RxKEejJFxJAfHqBx5n WITH compulsion triggers
MODIFY: WHEN ^"Hunger Dice" SHOWS 10 IN ^"Critical Pair" THEN #Ge42RxKEejJFxJAfHqBx5n ^"Messy Critical" TRIGGERED
MODIFY: blood_surge_mechanics NOW REFERENCES #YD4PosFYGnnbWia88WUziU ^"Blood Surge Table"
WHEN [REFERENCING ^"Blood Potency" EFFECTS] THEN USE #YD4PosFYGnnbWia88WUziU AND #j3R4UBSHhb2PCJRiA2QrBQ tables
WHEN [^"Blood Potency" INCREASES] THEN ^"Blood Surge" AND ^"Bane Severity" BOTH increase per tables
WHEN [^"Character Creation"] THEN START with updated values from beginning
WHEN [^"Blood Potency" == 0] THEN ^"Blood Surge" GRANTS 1 die instead of 0
WHEN [^"Thin-blood Character"] THEN GAINS ^"Blood Surge" ability with 1 die
WHEN [^"Blood Surge" USED] THEN REQUIRES ^"Rouse Check" as normal
WHEN [^"Blood Potency" 1-2] THEN ^"Blood Surge" MORE VIABLE for regular use
WHEN [^"Blood Potency" == 0] THEN ^"Bane Severity" EQUALS 1 instead of 0
WHEN [^"Thin-blood Character"] THEN GAINS ^"Bane Severity" BUT usually ignores unless ^"Clan Curse Flaw"
WHEN [^"Bane Severity" INCREASED] THEN ^"Clan Banes" BECOME more keenly felt curses
WHEN [^"Low Blood Potency"] THEN ^"Banes" NO LONGER mere nuisances

rules.text: WHEN [REFERENCING ^"Blood Potency" VALUES] THEN USE this consolidated table
WHEN [^"Blood Potency" INCREASES] THEN ALL associated values UPDATE per table
WHEN [^"Character Creation"] THEN START with updated values from beginning
WHEN [^"Messy Critical" OCCURS] THEN MAY trigger ^"Compulsion" like ^"Bestial Failure"
WHEN [^"Messy Critical" ON ^"Awareness Test"] THEN ^"Compulsion" HELPS explain tricky messes
WHEN [^"Messy Critical" ON ^"Passive Action"] THEN ^"Compulsion" PROVIDES narrative explanation
WHEN [CHOOSING ^"Complication"] THEN COMBINE options from ^"Messy Critical" AND ^"Bestial Failure" lists
WHEN [^"Compulsions" FROM ^"Messy Criticals"] THEN MAKES them more frequent in play
WHEN [#Ge42RxKEejJFxJAfHqBx5n ^"Messy Critical" OR ^"Bestial Failure"] THEN MAY trigger ^"Compulsion"
WHEN [^"Storyteller" CHOOSES compulsion] THEN USE combined smörgåsbord of complications
WHEN [^"Compulsion" TRIGGERED] THEN CONSIDER both mechanical AND narrative context

properties.name: Calculation
properties.value: Half dice pool rounded down as successes

properties.name: Storyteller Hints
properties.value: ["This seems really beneath you", "You're not sure you can crack this without serious effort"]

rules.text: WHEN [^"Player" WANTS to ensure win on easy test] THEN MAY choose ^"Taking Half"
WHEN [^"Player" WANTS to avoid ^"Hunger" complications] THEN MAY choose ^"Taking Half"
WHEN [USING ^"Taking Half"] THEN COUNT half dice pool AS regular successes
WHEN [^"Storyteller" SETS difficulty] THEN KEEP exact number secret
WHEN [^"Test Difficulty" OBVIOUS] THEN ^"Storyteller" MAY provide descriptive hints
WHEN [^"Taking Half" CHOSEN] THEN NO ^"Hunger Dice", NO ^"Bestial Failures", NO #Ge42RxKEejJFxJAfHqBx5n ^"Messy Criticals"
WHEN [^"Taking Half" SPEEDS up gameplay] THEN GIVES more player control over ^"Hunger" effects
WHEN [^"Test" CLEARLY beneath character capability] THEN ^"Storyteller" SHOULD grant ^"Automatic Win"
WHEN [^"Automatic Win" GRANTED] THEN NO dice rolling required
WHEN [#TuWhXEfaJMCjJrhzvVF8iA ^"Taking Half" AVAILABLE] THEN PROVIDES alternative to ^"Automatic Win"

properties.name: Player Choice
properties.value: When to roll vs Take Half

rules.text: WHEN [SETTING ^"Test Difficulty"] THEN KEEP exact number secret from players
WHEN [^"Players" NEED guidance] THEN PROVIDE descriptive hints about difficulty
WHEN [^"Difficulty" VERY low] THEN MAY hint "this seems really beneath you"
WHEN [^"Difficulty" VERY high] THEN MAY hint "you're not sure you can crack this without serious effort"
WHEN [^"Players" CHOOSE roll vs #TuWhXEfaJMCjJrhzvVF8iA ^"Taking Half"] THEN GIVES more control over ^"Hunger" risk

properties.name: Table Authority
properties.value: Storytellers and players know their table best

properties.name: Change Reason
properties.value: Extended play feedback and clarification needs

rules.text: WHEN [USING ^"Errata"] THEN IMPLEMENTATION is optional for each table
WHEN [^"Old Ways" WORKED for troupe] THEN ^"Storytellers" NOT required to adopt changes
WHEN [^"Extended Play" REVEALS issues] THEN ^"Updates" ADDRESS over- and under-performance
WHEN [^"Rules Clarity" NEEDED] THEN ^"Errata" PROVIDES better definitions
WHEN [^"Future Printings" OF core book] THEN WILL include these changes
WHEN [^"Latest Errata Document" AVAILABLE] THEN CONTAINS ^"[Presence]Lingering Kiss" update
WHEN [^"Table" ADOPTS errata] THEN SHOULD use consistently throughout chronicle
WHEN [^"Mixed Implementation"] THEN ENSURE all players understand which rules in use

properties.name: Tenets
properties.value:
[
                "Exist in accord with the needs of the Beast",
                "Do what you must to survive. No more, no less.",
                "Mercy is for the weak. Only the strong survive.",
                "The past is dead, the future is unborn. The moment is yours.",
                "Respect only the strong"
            ]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Taking foolhardy risks

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: Survival is paramount

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["Permanently have the effects of Aura; appear as a living creature to beasts", "Heal Superficial damage as a mortal", "You can taste, eat, and digest food that you hunt", "Healing Aggravated damage during day sleep requires one Rouse check"]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Leaving the weak unchallenged

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: Only the strongest should lead

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["Permanently have the effects of Aura; appear as an ill creature", "Heal Superficial damage as a mortal", "Healing Aggravated damage during day sleep requires two Rouse checks"]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Killing without need

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: Murder is a creation of society

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["Roll two dice for the Aura Rouse check and take the highest result"]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Avoiding the wilds

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: In nature lies strength; civilization is soft and weak

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["Using Aura negates penalties from drinking animal blood", "With no penalties from animal blood, you can sate one additional Hunger than usual from an animal regardless of size"]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Tormenting others needlessly

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: Only civilized folk engage in these things

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["With Aura, penalties from drinking animal blood are treated as one Blood Potency level lower"]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Making unbidden sacrifice

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: You owe others nothing

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["You suffer a one-die penalty to interact with non-hostiles outside of Intimidation or inhuman ways"]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Failing to kill when necessary

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: Nothing is more important than survival

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["You suffer a two-dice penalty to interact with non-hostiles"]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Not defending your territory

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: Those who do not defend their territory have it taken from them

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["You suffer a four-dice penalty to interact with non-hostiles"]

nested.value: Showing your enemies mercy

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: Mercy is for the weak

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["You suffer a six-dice penalty to interact with non-hostiles; Aura reduces the penalty to four"]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Failing to feed your hunger

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: The Beast must be satisfied

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["You suffer an eight-dice penalty to interact with non-hostiles; Aura reduces this to five"]

properties.name: Tenets
properties.value:
[
                "A man is measured by his words, his deeds and his heart, not an accident of birth or circumstance",
                "The ability to reason separates man from beast",
                "Do unto others as you would have them do unto you",
                "All men are brothers",
                "Freedom is earned with dignity and justice"
            ]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Selfish thoughts

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: Thought is as good as deed

nested.name: Rationale

properties.name: Tenets
properties.value:
[
                "God laid His mark upon Caine and his childer are part of His great plan",
                "The word of God is law. Defiance of God is a sin that leads to damnation",
                "No one is above God's law",
                "Love and serve God in all things",
                "Deny the Devil through denial of the Beast and all creatures of Hell"
            ]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Violating any of the Ten Commandments

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: God's word is law

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["Permanently have the effects of Aura; appear as a divine being", "Add 2 additional dice when resisting True Faith abilities"]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Failing to speak out against corruption and sin

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: All the Devil requires is for the faithful to do nothing

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["Blush of Life hides your undead aura from supernatural detection by non-Cainites", "Add 1 additional die when resisting True Faith abilities"]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Acting out of pride, avarice, gluttony, or some other sinful impulse

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: Sin is the road to the Beast

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["Roll two dice for the Aura Rouse check and take the highest result"]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Theft, robbery, willful vandalism

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: Thou shalt not steal

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["With Aura, add 2 dice to checks made to hide your undead aura from supernatural detection by non-Cainites"]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Causing harm to pious and virtuous persons

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: God sees all and punishes such sins

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["With Aura, add 1 die to checks made to hide your undead aura from supernatural detection by non-Cainites"]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Feeding from an innocent without permission

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: God protects the innocent

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["You suffer a one-die penalty to interact with pious humans outside of Intimidation or inhuman ways"]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Blasphemous or heretical acts

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: Denial of God leads only to damnation

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["You suffer a two-dice penalty to interact with pious humans"]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Allowing crime or major sin to go unpunished

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: Vengeance is mine, sayeth the Lord

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["You suffer a four-dice penalty to interact with the pious"]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: The murder of innocents

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: Thou shalt not kill

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["You suffer a six-dice penalty to interact with the pious; Aura reduces the penalty to four"]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Aiding a demon or other supernatural agent of evil

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: Serve evil and you serve the Beast

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["You suffer an eight-dice penalty to interact with the pious; Aura reduces this to five"]

properties.name: Tenets
properties.value:
[
                "There are only two roles in this world: that of master and that of servant",
                "You are superior to mortals, made to rule",
                "To master others, you must first master yourself and the Beast within",
                "Only those who seize power gain it; only those who use power keep it",
                "Your word is your bond. Without it, you are nothing"
            ]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Neglecting your duty

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: Those who fail in their responsibilities often lose them

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["Permanently have the effects of Aura; appear as an authority figure", "You may use your Mending ability to heal Superficial Willpower instead of physical damage once a night"]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Treating a peer with disrespect

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: A leader earns respect by acting respectfully

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["Permanently have the effects of Blush of Life; appear as an important figure", "You heal your full Willpower rating in Superficial damage at the beginning of a session"]

nested.name: Moral Guideline
nested.value: Treating an inferior as an equal

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: Everyone should know their place, including you

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["Roll two dice for the Aura Rouse check and take the highest result", "While your Aura is active, you may re-roll one additional die when spending Willpower to do so"]

nested.value: Breaking your word to a peer

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: Trust is earned by being trustworthy

nested.name: Effects

nested.value: Behaving shamefully before your peers

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: Honor and reputation are everything

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["While Aura is active, reduce any Superficial Willpower damage caused by Social Combat by one"]

nested.value: Showing weakness in front of your inferiors

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: A leader must be seen as strong

nested.name: Effects

nested.name: Rationale
nested.value: Honor must be maintained; challenges cannot go unanswered

nested.name: Effects
nested.value: ["You suffer a two-dice penalty to interact with those of lower station"]

nested.name: Rationale

properties.value: Neonate — embraced less than 100 years ago; the earliest a Cainite would be trusted with autonomy
